name: Meteor Shower
description: A Torgue MIRV grenade that bursts into a dense cluster of child grenades, blanketing the area with chained explosions. It tears through groups and becomes especially dangerous in tight spaces where the blasts overlap. Compared with Bonus Package at the same level and with similar parts, it throws out more child grenades and deals higher damage per grenade.
notes: It can spawn with any delivery type.

special.description: Each child grenade creates another child grenade when it explodes, greatly increasing total damage and coverage.
special.title: Not just for wishing on!
